description: Bug Hunt pack leader types - Compendium p.197. Rolled on D6 when pack leader is present. Max 3 pack leaders per mission.
detection_rule: Roll three D12. If any die rolls equal to or below the number of enemies revealed by the marker, a pack leader is present. Discard one D12 from the pool going forward (max 3 leaders per mission).
availability: Not available in the first two missions of the campaign.

leaders.name: Leader
leaders.effect: When moving a Contact marker within 9", a Chance die is not rolled, only an Aggression die. The leader acts as a focus ensuring the foe targets your positions.

leaders.name: Lancer
leaders.effect: At the end of each move, if a trooper is in Line of Sight, the Lancer fires a dart at the nearest visible trooper. Hits on D6 roll of 5+ (regardless of Combat Skill or cover), Damage 1, ignores armor. Lancers always move to Cover with trooper visibility and will not enter close combat.

leaders.name: Caller
leaders.effect: Each time the Caller is activated, roll 1D6. If the roll is higher than the number of Contacts on the table, place a Contact adjacent to the Caller. The Caller will attempt to move to the center of the table and hide there.

leaders.name: Assassin
leaders.effect: Increase Damage and Combat Skill by 1. All attacks from the Assassin ignore armor.

leaders.name: Bruiser
leaders.effect: Increase Toughness by 1. The enemy receives a 4+ saving throw against all Hits, replacing its normal save (if any).

leaders.name: Driver
leaders.effect: All enemies that begin their activation within 6" of the Driver increase their movement by +1" for the round.
